mapper.select: SELECT unit_minutes AS unitMinutes, price FROM rental_room_pricing_base WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT apply_to AS applyTo, unit_minutes AS unitMinutes, price FROM rental_room_pricing_weekend_holiday WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, date, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, unit_minutes AS unitMinutes, price FROM rental_room_pricing_special WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY date ASC, start_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_room_pricing_base ( room_id, unit_minutes, price, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{unitMinutes}, #{price}, NOW(), NULL, NOW(), NULL, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unit_minutes = VALUES(unit_minutes), price = VALUES(price), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_room_pricing_weekend_holiday SET apply_to = #{applyTo}, unit_minutes = #{unitMinutes}, price = #{price}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_room_pricing_weekend_holiday ( room_id, apply_to, unit_minutes, price, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{applyTo}, #{unitMinutes}, #{price}, NOW(), NULL, NOW(), NULL, 0 )

INSERT INTO rental_room_pricing_special ( room_id, date, start_time, end_time, unit_minutes, price, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{date}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{unitMinutes}, #{price}, NOW(), NULL, NOW(), NULL, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_room_pricing_special SET date = #{date}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, unit_minutes = #{unitMinutes}, price = #{price}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE rental_room_pricing_special SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
